phrases.intent_en: How long to see all painted churches?
phrases.text_local: Boyalı kiliselerin hepsini gezmek ne kadar sürer?
phrases.cultural_note: Duration estimates are unverified. A tour guide or museum attendant can provide realistic timing.

likely_response.translation_en: Set aside an hour and a half.

responses.english: Set aside an hour and a half.

phrases.intent_en: Do I need a separate ticket for Apple Church?
phrases.text_local: Elmalı Kilise için ayrı bilet gerekiyor mu?
phrases.cultural_note: Bilet politikaları değişebilir, biletçiden teyit alınmalıdır.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, entrance has a separate fee.

responses.english: Yes, entrance has a separate fee.

phrases.cultural_note: Otopark işlemleri için en yetkili kişi park memurudur.

likely_response.translation_en: At the security booth at the entrance.

responses.english: At the security booth at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Dark Church entrance?
phrases.cultural_note: Müze görevlileri genellikle en doğru yönlendirmeyi yapar.

likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the walking path.

responses.english: At the end of the walking path.

phrases.intent_en: Is the audio guide available in Japanese?
phrases.cultural_note: Dil seçenekleri değişiklik gösterebilir, kontrol ettirmek en iyisidir.

likely_response.translation_en: It is available at the entrance.

responses.english: It is available at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Do I need a separate ticket for Apple Church?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket rules for specific churches are unverified. The ticket booth can provide accurate information.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, an additional ticket is required.

responses.english: Yes, an additional ticket is required.

phrases.intent_en: How long to see all painted churches?
phrases.text_local: Karanlık Kilise'yi gezmek ne kadar sürer?
phrases.cultural_note: Süre, kalabalığa ve ilgi seviyenize göre değişir.
